output.setting: A decaying, reality-bending space station trapped in a temporal rift

pickup.name: Phase-Shift Battery
pickup.effect: Grants temporary invulnerability and kinetic phasing

encounters.trigger: The death of the Scavenger ruptures the airlock, revealing the entrance to the engine room

pickup.name: Void Core Shard
pickup.effect: Increases electrical output and damage against temporal-shifted entities

encounters.trigger: The collapse of the Guard releases a signal pulse that activates the command bridge elevator

pickup.name: Emergency Override Key
pickup.effect: Disables the primary defensive energy shields of the station master

encounters.trigger: Destroying the Drone allows the player to insert the Override Key into the vault control panel

boss.name: The Entropy Herald
boss.victory_condition: Use the Emergency Override Key to strip the Herald's permanent shield, then land a final charged strike

output.objective: Stabilize the station reactor before the temporal rift consumes the entire sector
